# Lucas Murphy Real Estate

> Lucas Murphy, Realtor with Provision Properties Core Team — eXp Realty. Real estate services across Milwaukee, Waukesha, Ozaukee, Washington Counties in metro Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Free buyer/seller/investor guides, monthly county and municipality market data, and home-buying tools.
